<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Enforce conventional package names. Strider default: lower-case letters and digits.

## Bad

```go
package http_util
```

## Good

```go
package httputil
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only package-naming`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
